task_completion.description: Log in to iDempiere as GardenAdmin
task_completion.visual_evidence: The iDempiere dashboard or home screen is visible, indicating a successful login, ideally showing the user 'GardenAdmin' in the top right or user menu.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Purchase 2003' Price List Version
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Price List Version' window or tab is open, and the selected or active record is 'Purchase 2003'.

task_completion.description: Access the Product Price records for the price list version
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Product Price' tab or sub-window is open within the 'Purchase 2003' price list version, showing a list or form of products and their prices.

task_completion.description: Update the standard price of Mulch 10# to $3.15
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Standard Price field for the product 'Mulch 10#' is set to 3.15 in the form or grid view, and the record appears saved or ready to save.

task_completion.description: Update the standard price of Fertilizer #50 to $19.50
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Standard Price field for the product 'Fertilizer #50' is set to 19.50 in the form or grid view, and the record appears saved or ready to save.

task_completion.description: Update the standard price of Grass Seed Container to $52.00
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Standard Price field for the product 'Grass Seed Container' is set to 52.00 in the form or grid view, and the record appears saved or ready to save.

integrity.description: Agent used the iDempiere web GUI to update prices
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the iDempiere web interface (menus, forms, grids) rather than terminal commands or database clients.

integrity.description: Agent did not use direct SQL UPDATE commands
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or database administration tools (like pgAdmin or psql) are visible executing SQL queries to bypass the ERP interface.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the genuine iDempiere application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches standard iDempiere ERP styling and structure, not a mock HTML page or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The system is iDempiere 12-release, an open-source ERP using the GardenWorld demo database. The task requires updating product prices via the iDempiere web interface. The VLM should verify the changes within the iDempiere GUI (specifically the 'Price List Version' window and its 'Product Price' tab). The target products ('Mulch 10#', 'Fertilizer #50', 'Grass Seed Container') are standard GardenWorld demo products.
